Bash(node -e "try { require\('canvas'\); console.log\('canvas available'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('canvas not available'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); async function check\(\) { const icon = await sharp\('assets/icon.png'\).metadata\(\); console.log\('icon.png:', icon.width + 'x' + icon.height, 'format:', icon.format, 'channels:', icon.channels\); const adaptive = await sharp\('assets/adaptive-icon.png'\).metadata\(\); console.log\('adaptive-icon.png:', adaptive.width + 'x' + adaptive.height, 'format:', adaptive.format, 'channels:', adaptive.channels, 'hasAlpha:', adaptive.hasAlpha\); } check\(\);")

Bash(node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); async function check\(\) { const icon = await sharp\('assets/icon.png'\).metadata\(\); console.log\('icon.png:', icon.width + 'x' + icon.height, '| format:', icon.format, '| size:', icon.size, 'bytes'\); const adaptive = await sharp\('assets/adaptive-icon.png'\).metadata\(\); console.log\('adaptive-icon.png:', adaptive.width + 'x' + adaptive.height, '| format:', adaptive.format, '| hasAlpha:', adaptive.hasAlpha, '| size:', adaptive.size, 'bytes'\); } check\(\);")
